name: MONARCH CASINO & RESORT INC
business: Monarch Casino & Resort, Inc. owns and operates two casino resorts: the Atlantis Casino Resort Spa in Reno, Nevada and the Monarch Casino Resort Spa Black Hawk in Black Hawk, Colorado, offering casino gaming, hotel accommodations, food and beverage, spa, and other amenities. The company derives revenue from casino operations, hotel room sales, and food and beverage services, targeting leisure travelers, conventioneers, and local residents.
sellsTo: Denver metropolitan area and Colorado mountain areas patrons

exposures.sentence: Monarch owns and operates the Atlantis Casino Resort Spa, a hotel and casino in Reno, Nevada (the Atlantis ) and the Monarch Casino Resort Spa Black Hawk (the Monarch Black Hawk ), a hotel and casino in Black Hawk, Colorado.

tamClaims.claim: Reno/Sparks region aggregate gaming revenues of approximately $968 million for the twelve months ended December 31, 2025.
tamClaims.sentence: The Reno/Sparks region is a major gaming and leisure destination with aggregate gaming revenues of approximately $968 million (as reported by the Nevada Gaming Control Board for the twelve months ended December 31, 2025).

tamClaims.claim: Black Hawk/Central City area gaming market generated approximately $936 million in gaming revenues for the twelve months ended December 31, 2025.
tamClaims.sentence: The Black Hawk/Central City area gaming market generated approximately $936 million in gaming revenues for the twelve months ended December 31, 2025, according to the Colorado Division of Gaming.
